creator: tagattie@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Eirik Oeverby from comment #0)

I have the same issue with my local poudriere build environment. I guess the problem is caused by the recent update of www/npm to 8.18.0.

There is a patch proposed in bug 266159 and I hope it will solve the problem (though I have not tried myself yet).
